name: boundary_calibration
description: Refine how boundary supervision influences the shared features without adding heavy compute.
prompt_extra: Build on the current best boundary-supervision baseline. Make exactly one focused change in train.py. Target only boundary-head usage, boundary-conditioned feature fusion, or boundary loss calibration. Keep the local neighborhood block unchanged. Avoid deeper local stacks, larger k, second neighborhood passes, or broad optimizer rewrites. Protect throughput first.
